frames.description: The image is a collage of three distinct panels. The top panel features a composite image of a large, grey alien head on the left and a glowing, metallic UFO with a bright light source on the right against a starry background. The middle panel shows a cloudy sky with a small, dark, disc-shaped object hovering in the center. The bottom panel displays a blurry, low-resolution image of a UFO emitting a beam of light downwards. Two red banners with white text overlay the image: the top banner reads "UFO recorded in Romania!" and the bottom banner reads "What do you think of this, let me know in comments!?"

frames.description: A dashcam view from inside a vehicle shows a large, dark storm cloud with visible wind damage to trees on both sides of a wet road. A red car is driving away in the distance. The sky is overcast and gray.

A dashcam view from inside a vehicle shows a tornado with dark clouds and debris swirling in the air, hitting a road with trees and buildings visible on the sides. Rain is falling heavily, and the windshield wipers are active.
A dashcam view shows a tornado swirling in the distance, with debris bouncing off the hood of a vehicle in the foreground.

A dashcam view shows a large, swirling tornado with debris flying through the air, approaching a vehicle. The dashboard and windshield wipers are visible in the foreground. A red circle highlights a person inside the car.
A dashcam view shows a large tornado rotating in the distance over a wet road, with a building on the left and trees on the right. Raindrops are visible on the windshield.

A dashcam view shows a large tornado swirling over a wet road with palm trees and buildings in the background. A person wearing a blue shirt is standing near the center of the storm, while another figure in red is visible further back on the left. The sky is dark and stormy.

post_text: In March 2019, a P-3C from the Pakistan Naval Air Arm intercepted an Indian submarine attempting to enter Pakistani waters at night. In October 2021, Pakistani Orions again intercepted an Indian Kalvari class submarine and blocked it from entering Pakistani Waters at the Arabian Sea. #paknavy #pakarmy #pakistanzindabad #fyp #foryou

frames.description: A man in a military flight suit and helmet stands in the doorway of a white aircraft, looking toward the camera.

Five individuals in dark flight suits are walking across a tarmac toward a large aircraft, carrying helmets in their hands. The aircraft has a circular emblem on its side featuring a stylized bird or eagle design.

Five individuals in dark flight suits are walking on a tarmac toward the rear of a large aircraft, carrying helmets in their hands. The aircraft has a circular emblem with a golden snake coiled around a central symbol on its fuselage.
Five pilots in dark flight suits walk across a tarmac carrying helmets, with the rear fuselage of a large aircraft featuring a circular emblem with a bird and a crescent moon visible behind them.
A group of five men in flight suits walk across a tarmac toward a large aircraft, carrying helmets in their hands. The aircraft features a circular emblem with a stylized bird on a dark background.

A group of five men in grey flight suits walk across a tarmac, carrying black helmets. Behind them is the nose section of a light aircraft with a ladder leading up to the cockpit. To the right, a circular emblem featuring a golden bird is visible on the fuselage.
A group of pilots in flight suits walk across a tarmac carrying helmets, with the nose of a large aircraft visible behind them.
Two individuals in military uniforms stand with their backs to the camera, looking at a large aircraft featuring a crescent moon and star insignia on its tail fin.

Two individuals in military uniforms are seen from behind, saluting while facing the tail section of a white aircraft. The aircraft features a green square insignia with a white crescent moon and star, and the number "80" is visible on the fuselage.

Two individuals in military uniforms with caps are seen from behind, standing in front of the rear fuselage of a white aircraft. The aircraft features a dark square insignia on its side displaying a crescent moon and star, along with the number "80" printed on the tail section.

A person in a military uniform and cap is seen from behind, saluting while standing next to the tail section of a white aircraft. The tail fin displays the number "80" above a green square emblem featuring a white crescent moon and star.
